collection_mode: manual review of logged-in Facebook Reels search results and two fixed public video pages; read-only

queries.assessment: High-density native Reels query in this visible sample.

visible_results.title: Ranking Pinoy Parlor Games Funny Moments

queries.assessment: Broadly relevant but lower density: the visible sample mixed a party-game Reel with commercial board-game venue content.

visible_results.title: Jack en Poy Barkada edition / Barkada Christmas Party Games! Jack en Poy ubusan ng Lahi!

detail_reviews.title: Ranking Pinoy Parlor Games Funny Moments
detail_reviews.visible_scene_signal: An outdoor multi-person physical activity with balloons and a ranking presentation layer was visible.
detail_reviews.rule_status: Insufficient for a complete rule reconstruction; excluded from the atom library.
detail_reviews.public_comment_signal: Only affective or mention-style responses were visible; no rule explanation was observed. Commenter identities were not retained.

detail_reviews.title: Jack en Poy Barkada edition / Barkada Christmas Party Games! Jack en Poy ubusan ng Lahi!
detail_reviews.visible_scene_signal: An indoor multi-person gathering with balloon props was visible. The title supports a Jack en Poy, barkada, Christmas-party and elimination-themed framing.
detail_reviews.rule_status: No complete transcript or rule sequence was observed; excluded from the atom library.
detail_reviews.public_comment_signal: Visible comments supported a friends-playing-together and gift or gathering context, but did not provide a complete rule explanation. Commenter identities were not retained.

findings.finding: Logged-in Facebook Reels search was accessible and returned native Philippine party-game results.

Pinoy parlor games was the higher-density query in this small visible sample: 4/4 relevant versus barkada party games, whose 2 broadly relevant results included one commercial venue or board-game result.
Facebook detail pages can provide stable public URLs, presentation context and engagement signals, but the two reviewed pages did not expose enough rule detail for game atoms.

privacy_and_interaction_policy.stored: Public page or creator labels, canonical public URLs, visible titles, dates, durations, display metrics, scene-level signals and paraphrased comment signals.
privacy_and_interaction_policy.not_stored: Private-group content, commenter identities, account identifiers beyond public page or creator labels, session parameters, cookies, tokens, screenshots or long comment text.
privacy_and_interaction_policy.interactions: No likes, reactions, follows, group joins, comments, messages or shares were performed.
